'''ây-s-k-n''' ('''kayaskenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pray|pray]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pray|pray]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-s-k-n
|-
! Lemma
| kayaskenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaskenoko|thiyaskenoko]] || [[word:jiyaskenoko|jiyaskenoko]] || [[word:shiyaskenoko|shiyaskenoko]] || [[word:kiyaskenoko|kiyaskenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyaskenoko|thuthuyaskenoko]] || [[word:jujuyaskenoko|jujuyaskenoko]] || [[word:shushuyaskenoko|shushuyaskenoko]] || [[word:kukuyaskenoko|kukuyaskenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyaskenoko|thoyaskenoko]] || [[word:joyaskenoko|joyaskenoko]] || [[word:shoyaskenoko|shoyaskenoko]] || [[word:koyaskenoko|koyaskenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyaskenoko|thĂŠyaskenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyaskenoko|jĂŠyaskenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyaskenoko|shĂŠyaskenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyaskenoko|kĂŠyaskenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayaskenoko|thayaskenoko]] || [[word:jayaskenoko|jayaskenoko]] || [[word:shayaskenoko|shayaskenoko]] || [[word:kayaskenoko|kayaskenoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
